473 THKNG_DSRGNZD_DSCHRG_CD THKNG_DSRGNZD_DSCHRG_CD Delirium: Disorganized thinking (Dsch) CHAR 1 At the time of discharge, was the patient's thinking disorganized or incoherent (rambling or irrelevant conversation, unclear or illogical flow of ideas, or unpredictable switching from subject to subject? 0 = Behavior not present 
1 = Behavior continuously present, does not fluctuate 
2 = Behavior present, fluctuates (comes and goes,
